Pinup Tax: Artist - Joyce Ballantyne Vol. 1-250 https://imgur.com/gallery/uDUzG Vol. 251-375 https://imgur.com/gallery/uFsPfR9 “Some humans would do anything to see if it was possible to do it. If you put a large switch in some cave somewhere, with a sign on it saying 'End-of-the-World Switch. PLEASE DO NOT TOUCH', the paint wouldn't even have time to dry.” ― Terry Pratchett, Thief of Time

item.title: Pick on someone you’re own size
item.dc:creator: ilikeapples2

item.title: Handouts
item.description: It's only a "handout" if a poor person or POC who didn't deserve it got it. This guy doesn't consider this a handout, because he feels entitled to it, unlike those lowly undeserving poor & brown people. The wealthy, and "entrepreneurs," are some of the biggest freeloaders we have. And that is absolutely by design.
item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: Don’t let the sun go down on meme - pt11
item.description:
These stages have turned into an infinite loop
Covered in blankets, AC blastin’, that’s the way to live babyyyyy
Not the time of year for these. Hell, I’m not even Christian. Yet, I still laughed.
Honestly, I thought Universal’s “Dark Universe” could’ve been cool, if done right. Like Penny Dreadful. Alas.
This one is so old. Has like 3 pixels left. But still one of my faves.
Doggo tax. She’s beauty. She’s grace. She’s a quivering mess when it thunders.
item.dc:creator: notyouraveragekatie

item.title: Mini dump at tea time
item.description:
I'm having tea instead of coffee
But you still get memes!
Thanks for the validation friends. Front page? Thanks!!! Here's the song I'm listening to at this very moment: https://open.spotify.com/track/4MJoTUDDncmvX6yh3Zsu7T?si=MLHpavmIQsuCH_wsbDJVcQ&utm_source=copy-link

https://www.rawstory.com/trump-unpaid-security-bills/

item.dc:creator: reservatio

item.title: Mark Cuban started an online pharmacy where over 100 lifesaving medications are offered at low costs. He charges a standard 15% markup in an industry that typically sees no less than 100% markup.
item.description: In just one example, a life saving leukemia drug with a typical retail price of $9,657 is offered by him for a total of $47. Insurance is not accepted due to the fact that it would force him to work with manufacturers requiring certain price points. https://costplusdrugs.com/
item.dc:creator: inbox1114

item.title: Save the bees ❤️
item.description: I was helping a bee out last August. The poor guy was hot and thirsty. I gave him some Hi C Orange drink and set him in a bush. Thank you for your service, little bee.
item.dc:creator: SpottieOttieDopalisciousAngel

item.title: Go on Cuba!
